description:
## Background

`bsm-kia.12` extracts raw `process.env.BEADSMITH_E2E_*` reads into
typed `HarnessInputs`. Once the expand step (`bsm-kia.12.1`)
lands, each consumer can swap its raw reads for the parser one
file at a time. Doing this in batches-sized-by-file keeps the
suite green between commits.

This sub-issue covers the migration for `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts` only.

## What to build

Replace every raw `process.env.BEADSMITH_E2E_*` (and the inline
`Scenario` / `Phase` parsing) in `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts` with a call to
the new `parseHarnessEnvironment` from `run-scenario.ts` (or
sibling). The file's behavior and error messages stay equivalent;
only the source of the typed inputs changes.

## Technical Approach

- Import `parseHarnessEnvironment` (and types as needed) from
  `e2e/issue-list/scripts/run-scenario.ts` (or sibling helper).
- Replace every `process.env.BEADSMITH_E2E_*` read in
  `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts` with a typed field from the `HarnessInputs`
  object returned by the parser.
- Delete the inline `Scenario` / `Phase` parsing chains and any
  per-`if` validation error strings; the parser's consolidated
  error replaces them.
- If `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts` is a spec, also replace inline
  `process.env.BEADSMITH_E2E_PHASE ?? "1"` reads and the
  `phase === "1" | "2"` branching inside `it()` blocks with the
  typed `phase` field from `HarnessInputs`.

## Considerations

- The consolidated error message from the parser may differ in
  text from the existing per-`if` errors; that's expected and is
  what the parent epic's acceptance criteria require.
- Spec files should still receive their `HarnessInputs` from
  somewhere â€” typically `before()` reads the parser output and
  stores the typed fields on a closure or shared object.
- The launcher (`run-scenario.ts`) is the only env producer; do
  not change the env vars it exports.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts` reads harness inputs only through the new
      typed parser; no `process.env.BEADSMITH_E2E_*` lookup remains.
- [ ] No inline `Scenario` / `Phase` parsing chain or per-`if`
      validation remains in `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts`.
- [ ] The file's runtime behavior and error reporting match the
      previous version (modulo the consolidated error message).
- [ ] `rg "process\.env\.BEADSMITH_E2E_" issue-list.restoration.spec.ts` returns
      zero hits.

## Test Plan

- Run `pnpm test` and `pnpm exec ultracite check` â€” both must
  pass.
- Run the targeted scenario for this file (if applicable):
  - `pnpm e2e:issue-list:success` for
    `issue-list.success.spec.ts`
  - `pnpm e2e:issue-list:empty` for `issue-list.empty.spec.ts`
  - `pnpm e2e:issue-list:atomic-switch` for
    `issue-list.atomic-switch.spec.ts`
  - `pnpm e2e:issue-list:restoration` for
    `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts`
- Run `pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete` to prove no scenario
  regression.
title: Migrate issue-list.restoration.spec.ts to typed harness parser
